arts.ttl: Dundee derby & Celtic v Kilmarnock in Scottish Cup
arts.sum: Celtic host Kilmarnock, Rangers meet Fraserburgh and there will be a Dundee derby at Dens Park after the draw for the fourth round of the Scottish Cup.

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart shares who he would 'definitely' pick for Celtic between Luke McCowan and Paulo Bernardo
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers did some great summer transfer work as he spent over £30m at Celtic after bringing in the likes of Auston Trusty, Arne Engels, Paulo Bernardo and Luke McCowan to the club. With Rodgers seemingly preferring either Engels or Bernardo to start in Champions League games for Celtic, Stewart said the Hoops boss must rethink that and put McCowan in as part of his European plans.

arts.ttl: ’The position we are in…’ James McFadden states if Celtic can finish top eight in Champions League
arts.sum: James McFadden saw the positive from the Brugge match and shared ‘it’s actually good for the position that we are in’, as he told Open Goal. Plus, it needs to be noted that this very Club Brugge side beat Aston Villa, so it’s not like the Belgian giants are struggling themselves.
